subject: Update vio plugin version to 1.3.2
commit_message:
Update vio plugin version to 1.3.2

Since 1.3.1 already releeased, bump version to 1.3.2

Change-Id: I571be12ef022c798e59992c107176dec8cdae01f
Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-606
Signed-off-by: Ethan Lynn <ethanlynnl@vmware.com>
